title: Gentle Grilled Uruguayan Butter Beans Grill
description: A nutty and pillowy post-workout Uruguayan dish featuring butter beans and pickle, made in a raclette-grill for a low-calorie friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the raclette-grill to medium heat.
In a bowl, mix together the butter beans, pickle slices, olive oil, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Place the mixture on the raclette-grill and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir the mixture again and continue cooking for another 5 minutes, or until the butter beans are heated through and slightly browned.
Remove the grill from the heat and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley, if using.
Serve the grilled butter beans hot, directly from the raclette-grill.
Let it cool for a few minutes before serving, if desired.
Garnish with additional pickle slices, if desired.
Refrigerate and consume within 1 week — this preparation is not shelf-stable without an approved acid level and canning process.

Refrigerator pickle only: store in the fridge and consume within 1 week. For shelf-stable canning, add at least 2 tablespoons of vinegar (5% acidity) per cup of brine and follow a tested water-bath process.
